source_pr.title: server: try to make test TestAllServerInfo stable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Use `TestAllServerInfo` to make test `TestAllServerInfo` stable

```sql

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z] FAIL: http_handler_test.go:1058: HTTPHandlerTestSuite.TestAllServerInfo

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z] 

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z] http_handler_test.go:1080:

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z]     c.Assert(ok, Equals, true)

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z] ... obtained bool = false

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z] ... expected bool = true

[2020-07-29T02:09:45.816Z] 
```

https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_check_2/detail/tidb_ghpr_check_2/43156/pipeline

### Related changes

- ...

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No

fix_pattern: server: try to make test TestAllServerInfo stable

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestAllServerInfo stable.
evidence: splits HTTP handler tests into normal and SerialSuites suites and runs TestAllServerInfo serially to avoid interference (server/http_handler_test.go).
